name: MiniMax MCP Server (JavaScript)
what_it_does: Official MiniMax MCP server (JavaScript) enabling AI agents to access MiniMax's multimodal AI capabilities — text-to-speech with voice cloning, speech-to-text, image generation, video generation, and music generation — integrating MiniMax's Chinese AI platform into agent-driven content creation workflows.
use_cases: Generating natural-sounding speech with voice cloning from content creation agents
Converting speech to text for transcription from processing agents
Generating images from text descriptions from creative agents
Creating short videos from prompts from media production agents
Generating music from descriptions from audio creation agents
Building Chinese-language TTS pipelines from localization agents
not_for: Teams needing only Western-language TTS (AWS Polly or ElevenLabs are better fits)
High-volume production TTS without MiniMax account
Teams with strict data residency requirements outside China
best_when: A team needs multimodal AI generation (TTS, image, video) with Chinese-language strength — MiniMax excels at Chinese TTS and offers competitive generation capabilities.
avoid_when: You only need English TTS — ElevenLabs or OpenAI TTS may be more accurate. Or if China data residency is a concern.

auth.notes: MiniMax API key required. Register at platform.minimaxi.com. Group ID also needed alongside API key.

pricing.paid_tiers: Usage-based: TTS from $0.12/1k chars; Image from $0.08/image
pricing.notes: Official MCP from MiniMax-AI org. Free trial credits available. Pay-per-use pricing for production. Chinese company platform.

known_agent_gotchas: Both API key AND Group ID required — two credentials to manage
Data processed in China — not suitable for sensitive content
Generation tasks (image, video) are async and may take minutes
Official MCP from MiniMax-AI org — well-maintained
Audio/video output files need storage handling — MCP may return URLs
Chinese platform — documentation quality in English varies
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key + Group ID. Official MCP. Content processed in China. Do not send sensitive content.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. API key + Group ID. Official MCP. China data residency.
